questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Transport Services?
options: Inefficient scaling of UDP stateless multiplexing vs TCP stateful byte-stream deliveries comparison.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of UDP stateless multiplexing vs TCP stateful byte-stream deliveries comparison.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how UDP stateless multiplexing vs TCP stateful byte-stream deliveries comparison scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
